body:
]> 20/07/2026 7:16 A sunny start to the week!.

It's a mostly sunny Monday at Perisher, with a top of 10 degrees and light westerly winds between 13-16km/h. We have 29 lifts scheduled to spin across the resort today - keep an eye on the lift report for real-time updates on lift operations or download the Perisher App to stay in the loop.

Demo days are in full swing at Perisher, with some great brands in-resort showcasing the latest ski and snowboard gear, including Burton, Nitro, Jones, Rossignol, Head and Elan. If you're on the hunt for your next board or set of skis, pop over and see them at Front Valley, between the Skitube bridge and Perisher Centre.

There's plenty more to look forward to this week too, with further demo days, live music, Station gigs and Christmas in July all on the cards. Head to the Events page or follow Perisher's socials to stay across it all.

]]> weather-blank Kosciuszko Road: Road open to Perisher.

Guthega Road: Road open to Guthega.

Alpine Way: Road open to Bullocks Flat, Skitube.

]]> Kosciuszko Road: Road open to Perisher.

]]> Guthega Road: Road open to Guthega.

]]> Alpine Way: Road open to Bullocks Flat, Skitube.

]]> 70.8 0 8 29 0 36 *Natural snow depth is supplemented with snowmaking in certain areas. Natural snow depth is measured at roughly 1,830m by Snowy Hydro Limited who have invested in new instrumentation across the Snowy Scheme and can now provide more frequent snow depth readings at a site close to the Spencers Creek snow course. This report reflects conditions at the date and time of this report. Conditions, lifts status and operations subsequent to this report may differ.
